title: My Disillusionment in Russia
author: Emma Goldman
description: **My Disillusionment in Russia** is a book by Emma Goldman, **published in 1923 by Doubleday, Page & Co.** The book was based on a much longer manuscript entitled "My Two Years in Russia" which was an eyewitness account of events in Russia from 1920 to 1921 that ensued in the wake of the Russian Revolution of 1917 and which culminated in the Kronstadt rebellion. Long-concerned about developments with the Bolsheviks, Goldman described the rebellion as the "final wrench.
